SELECT arrayDistinct([1, 2, 2, 3, 1]) AS distinct_array, count(*) AS total_count FROM test_array GROUP BY distinct_array;
CREATE TABLE another_array (id UInt32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayDistinct(arr) FROM another_array WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM another_array WHERE arrayExists(x -> x > 2, arr));
CREATE TABLE complex_table (id UInt32, value Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayDistinct(arrayConcat(value, [1, 2, 2, 3])) AS distinct_concat FROM complex_table;
SELECT id, arrayDistinct(arr) FROM (SELECT id, arr FROM another_array UNION ALL SELECT id, arr FROM test_array) AS combined;
CREATE TABLE nested_table (group_id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT group_id, arrayDistinct(arrayFlatten(groupArray(values))) FROM nested_table GROUP BY group_id;
